error_signature: Could not find a personal project for this user
title: Personal project not found after upgrade
symptom: After upgrading n8n, users receive a 'Could not find a personal project for this user' error when accessing personal projects, despite them being present in the database.
applies_when: Upgrading n8n to a major version
root_cause: The issue arises when the user database becomes corrupted during the upgrade process, leading to mismatches in user IDs and project associations. This can prevent the application from correctly identifying personal projects linked to the user.
fix_steps: Manually adjust the 'creatorId' in the 'project' table to match the correct user
Clean up any inconsistencies in the 'project_relation' table
agent_instruction: Manually correct the 'creatorId' in the project table and clean the project_relation table in the database.
safety_notes: Ensure to back up the database before making manual changes to avoid data loss.
